title: デビュー戦の後に・サイコーの初陣！

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: (Whoa... Holy cow! What is this feeling?!)

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
(That should've been my top speed already, but I
wanna to push myself to go even faster!)

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: RAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Spectacular. That performance was a true
paradigm of your own self—powerful and
straightforward.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I, too, must carry such scorching passion!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Traineeer!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I'm baaack!
choice_data_list: Great job, Bamboo! You were awesome!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Thank you very much!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But you know what?! I feel like I'm on fire, and the
flames just won't go out! I'm burning hot!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Let's hurry back to campus so I can get back to
training! The sooner the better!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory seems even more energized
than before the race. I guess we shouldn't let this
incredible motivation go to waste!
choice_data_list:
Sure! We can review your performance while
you train!

Sure! We can review your performance while
you train!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Okay! Thanks so much!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
All righty! Time to sprint my way to campus!
Ready or not, here I—

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Oh, right! Nearly forgot about that!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory's debut race ends with her
burning up with excitement and impatience for
the next race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day after her debut race...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory and I hold a meeting to discuss
her plans moving forward.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
What do you think I should do with the rest of my
junior year, Trainer?
choice_data_list:
First, we need to take our time and build up
your experience.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory has a lot of natural talent, but
we still don't know what races will help her shine
the brightest.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's why we should take things slow and use her
junior year to refine her speed and determine the
best races for her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: In other words...
choice_data_list: We're going to make it your training arc.
We're going to make it your training arc.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: My training arc?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Oh man, I love the sound of that!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Let's get things started right away! What should I
do first? Should I start running?!
choice_data_list: Hey now, don't get ahead of yourself.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Ack! You stopped me just in time. I was about to
speed my way over to the track again.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But okay! I understand what I gotta do! My very
own training arc... I can't wait!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, Bamboo Memory's exciting junior year
training arc begins!
